prompt_order.title: ZETA_BLOCKER_RECONCILIATION-0
human_review_requirements: distributed_authority_model_changes FULL review when blocker reconciliation reinterprets handoff or quorum semantics
trust_root_governance_changes FULL review when trust admission or revocation posture is narrowed
lifecycle_manager_semantics FULL review when cutover, drain, frozen, or transfer legality is reclassified
stop_conditions: stop if blocker reconciliation starts to treat shard or net precursor substrate as proof-backed distributed readiness
stop if Ζ-P0 begins to implement live operations or distributed machinery
stop if blocker reconciliation silently downgrades open Ζ risks into solved capabilities
notes: Ready status is admission-planning only and does not admit Ζ live operations.
Ζ-P0 must preserve the distinction between doctrinal possibility, operational admission, and actual execution.

prompt_order.title: LIVE_OPERATIONS_PREREQUISITE_MATRIX-0
dependencies: the same runtime, trust, receipt, and release-control doctrine packet consumed by Ζ-P0
human_review_requirements: distributed_authority_model_changes FULL review if the matrix reclassifies transfer or convergence prerequisites
trust_root_governance_changes FULL review if the matrix narrows live trust-transition admission posture
stop_conditions: stop if the matrix claims that replication proof, trust convergence, or runtime cutover proof already exist
stop if the matrix treats mirror, archive, task, or MCP exposure as execution readiness
notes: Ζ-P1 is still admission work and must remain subordinate to active checkpoint law.

prompt_order.title: ZETA_EXECUTION_GATES-0
dependencies: completed Ζ-P1 live operations prerequisite matrix
human_review_requirements: distributed_authority_model_changes FULL review when execution gates imply authority-transfer posture
trust_root_governance_changes FULL review when execution gates imply live trust-execution posture
licensing_commercialization_policy FULL review when execution gates reinterpret publication or trust execution posture with external policy impact
stop_conditions: stop if execution gates infer permission from doctrine alone
stop if execution gates imply live trust execution, distributed handoff, replication proof, or receipt-pipeline realization
notes: Ζ-P2 freezes admission gates for later bounded Ζ entry; it does not authorize Ζ execution by itself.

prompt_order.title: PRE_ZETA_ADMISSION_REASSESSMENT-0
human_review_requirements: checkpoint must verify no live-ops, distributed, release, or trust implementation work was performed
checkpoint must verify Ζ-P kept Ζ blockers explicit rather than flattening them into optimistic gating
stop_conditions: stop before any bounded Ζ execution-planning move until the post-Ζ-P checkpoint exists
notes: This checkpoint decides whether any residual Υ-D3 consolidation tail is still needed.

prompt_order.title: LIVE_RELEASE_CONTROLLER_AND_AUTOMATION_ALIGNMENT-0
dependencies: post-Ζ-P checkpoint explicitly finds controller-specific or automation-specific residue
human_review_requirements: do not schedule unless the post-Ζ-P checkpoint identifies a distinct residue rather than restating already-closed doctrine
stop_conditions: skip if the post-Ζ-P checkpoint finds no distinct controller or automation residue
notes: Not required before Ζ-P from the current checkpoint state.

blocked_or_dangerous_items.item: deterministic replication proof as an implementation claim
live publication execution automation without explicit post-Ζ-P admission

stability.replacement_target: later post-Ζ-P next-order artifact may refine sequence without replacing the ordering law frozen here
